---
title: 'Daredevil'
date: '2015-05-24T05:44:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '626354760637052283'
blogger_filename: '/2015/05/daredevil.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Just watched season one episodes 2/3 of Marvels' Daredevil... Utter Crap. I find myself asking... would I have watched that if it wasn't under that name? No. I'd have turned it off and got something else.<br />
<br />
I find myself asking... couldn't I write better fiction than this?<br />
<br />
Utter Crap
